text.description: Styled text with color, bold, dim, underline, and strikethrough support

container.description: Layout container with padding, margin, border, and flex

progress.description: Progress bar with percentage display and customizable fill

table.description: Data table with headers, column alignment, and borders

input.description: Text input with placeholder, onChange, and onSubmit

select.description: Arrow-key select menu with highlight styling

checkbox.description: Multi-select checkbox list with toggle support

alert.description: Alert box with info, success, warning, and error variants

card.description: Bordered card container with optional title and footer
